case_title: DERUNGS, HERBERT JOHN VS ERB, ERNST et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $350.00 FILED BY DERUNGS, HERBERT JOHN AS TO DEFENDANT ERB, ERNST GRAVES, MALCOLM X. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-07-1995 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DERUNGS, HERBERT JOHN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ERB, ERNST GRAVES, MALCOLM X. $350.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $365.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
